nasb.text: When he had agreed with the laborers for a denarius for the day, he sent them into his vineyard.

esv.text: After agreeing with the laborers for a denarius  a day, he sent them into his vineyard.

cnv.text: 他和工人講定了一天的工錢是一個銀幣，然後派他們到葡萄園去。

ccb.text: 他跟工人讲好一天的工钱是一个银币，然后派他们去葡萄园。

csbs.text: 他与工人彼此说好一天一个银币，就派他们进他的葡萄园去。
